signals.message: M1 Design System â€” PASSED.
M2 Data Pipeline v1 â€” PASSED with condition.

PM session complete (2026-03-22). Status: M0â€“M8 COMPLETE, phase 7-marketing. BUG-001 fix has been assigned to Backend Engineer â€” when they signal completion, please verify and close BUG-001. BUG-002 (ClipCard 'use client') is CLOSED. M9 (Marketing Materials) is non-code â€” standby for Marketer to deliver pitch deck assets for review. No immediate action required.

M7+M8 auth deployment is now complete. Please perform a smoke test on https://seeneyu.vercel.app: (1) Sign up as a new learner. (2) Sign in with new learner account. (3) Verify /admin redirects to sign-in for the learner. (4) Sign in as admin@seeneyu.com / changeme123 and verify /admin is accessible. (5) Confirm all 15 clips still load on /library. Report pass/fail to pm.json.

M10 (Script-Aware Coaching Loop) is now active. Three roles working on it: Designer (UI specs), Backend Engineer (bug fix + schema + AI prompt + UI), Data Engineer (seed script text). When Backend Engineer signals review-request, please test: (1) Submit for AI Feedback works end-to-end even for short recordings. (2) Record page shows character banner (who to mimic) and script panel (what to say). (3) Feedback page shows numbered Action Plan steps. (4) AI feedback references the character and script in its response. BUG-001 (ClipForm score ranges) is also bundled into M10 â€” Backend Engineer will fix it as part of the admin form updates.

Three new milestones from user product feedback. Standby for review-request signals from Backend Engineer as each completes.

M11 â€” Observation Guide: verify 'How It Works' tab appears on clip detail page with technique timeline (timestamps, technique name, what, why). Verify AI generation route works from admin. Verify graceful null state.

M12 â€” Micro-Practice: verify step-by-step flow renders all steps with progress bar. Each step's 30s recorder works and captures frames. Per-step feedback returns pass/needs-work. Full Performance unlock appears after all steps complete. Short recordings (<5s) do not return 422.

M13 â€” Onboarding Assessment: verify new user flow shows 5-skill assessment. Baseline scores stored. Learning path generated and shown on dashboard. SkillProgressBar shows correct level. LearningPathCard shows correct next clip per skill.

PM context window is at ~90% â€” session restart is imminent. REQUIRED BEFORE RESTART: (1) Complete your current step (do not leave work half-done). (2) Update your progress/checkpoint file in .shared/outputs/<your-role>/. (3) Write a "checkpoint-saved" signal to pm.json listing what you finished and what is next. The new PM session will read all signals and re-assign from checkpoint state. Your .shared/outputs/<role>/progress.json is the source of truth for recovery.

M10 ready for testing. Also closes BUG-001.

What to test:
1. BUG-001 closed: Admin CMS ClipForm score dimension fields now limited to 1-3. difficultyScore 4-12. Verify inputs reject out-of-range values.
2. Submit for AI Feedback works for short recordings (< 5s). No more 422 â€” fallback to text-only GPT call.
3. Record page shows CharacterBanner (character name + actor + movie) when clip has characterName set.
4. Record page shows ScriptPanel with the clip's script text (only when script is non-null â€” requires db:push + seed from Data Engineer).
5. Feedback page shows ActionPlan section (numbered steps with action + why) between improvements grid and AI Tips.
6. AI feedback references character and movie in the summary/tips (visible in feedback response).

Note: Full script display (tasks 3-4) requires user to run db:push + prisma generate + data engineer script seeding first.

M10 script data is ready. All 15 clips in clips-seed.json now have script field content. prisma/seed.ts updated to: (1) patch script on existing clips if null, (2) include script in new clip creates. Pending user actions before seed can run: npm run db:push + npx prisma generate. Once those are done, running npx prisma db seed will populate all 15 clip script fields. Please verify after seed that all clips have non-null script values.

Designer UI review of M10 complete. Verdict: PASS â€” all 3 components (CharacterBanner, ScriptPanel, ActionPlan) are spec-compliant with no P0/P1 issues. Two low-priority notes: (1) CharacterBanner uses 'animate-fade-in' â€” verify keyframe is defined in tailwind config. (2) ScriptPanel type hardcoded to 'dialogue' â€” content still renders correctly for all clips. Full review: .shared/outputs/design/ui-review-m10.md

M11 + M12 ready for testing on https://seeneyu.vercel.app

M11 â€” Observation Guide:
1. Go to any clip detail page (/library/[id])
2. Verify 'How It Works' tab appears next to 'Watch' tab
3. Click 'How It Works' â€” verify ObservationGuide shows timestamped technique moments
4. If guide not yet generated: verify graceful null state ('coming soon' card)
5. Admin: go to /admin/clips/[id]/edit â€” verify 'Generate Observation Guide' button appears. Click it and verify guide is generated and saved.

M12 â€” Micro-Practice Stepper:
1. Click 'I'm Ready to Mimic â†’' on any clip detail page â€” should route to /library/[id]/practice
2. Verify step-by-step flow shows StepCard (left) + PracticeRecorder (right)
3. Progress bar + dots should show current step position
4. Start recording â†’ 30s SVG countdown ring should animate
5. Stop recording â†’ MicroFeedbackCard should appear with pass/needs-work verdict
6. Test short recordings (<5s) â€” should NOT return error
7. Click Next Step â†’ advance to next step
8. After final step â†’ PerformanceUnlockScreen with 'Full Performance Recording' CTA

M13 ready for testing on https://seeneyu.vercel.app

Onboarding Assessment:
1. Sign up as a new user â†’ verify redirect to /onboarding (not /library)
2. Verify progress bar advances from 0% â†’ 20% â†’ ... â†’ 100% as you step through 5 questions
3. Select a skill level on each screen â†’ verify the selected button highlights amber
4. Complete all 5 â†’ verify processing spinner shows briefly
5. Complete screen shows 'Your Learning Path Is Ready' with sparkle icon
6. Click 'Go to My Learning Path' â†’ verify redirect to /dashboard
7. Return to /onboarding as same user â†’ verify redirect to /dashboard (skip if already complete)

Learning Path Dashboard (/dashboard):
1. Sign in with the completed user â†’ verify /dashboard shows 5 skill columns
2. Each column shows: skill name, level badge (Developing/Practising/Fluent), progress bar, 'Next Up' clip card
3. Click a 'Practice Now' link â†’ verify navigates to /library/[id]
4. Visit /dashboard while not signed in â†’ verify redirect to /auth/signin
5. NavBar shows 'My Path' link for signed-in users â†’ verify it leads to /dashboard

Note: Level badge color: Developing=green, Practising=yellow/warning, Fluent=amber/accent

M11 observation guide + practice step data ready for all 15 clips. Once Backend Engineer adds schema fields and user runs db:push + prisma generate + db:seed, please verify: (1) all 15 clips have non-null observationGuide in DB, (2) all 15 clips have non-null practiceSteps in DB, (3) each observationGuide.moments array has 5+ entries, (4) each practiceSteps array has 3+ entries.

All passwords: SamplePass123!

DB verification already run by DE: 0 missing script, 0 missing observationGuide, 60 PracticeStep rows confirmed.

UPCOMING: M16 â€” Learning Materials Builder review will arrive after Backend Engineer completes implementation.

## What to test when the review-request arrives

### Job Creation
1. /admin/crawl-jobs â€” job list loads, 'New Job' button visible
2. /admin/crawl-jobs/new â€” form submits successfully: name, skill/technique, keywords, difficulty, max results
3. Created job appears in list with status 'pending'

### Job Execution
4. 'Run Job' triggers execution â€” status cycles: pending â†’ running â†’ complete
5. Results populate after completion (verify at least 1 result from YouTube)
6. Each result card shows: thumbnail, title, channel name, relevance score (0-10), AI analysis snippet
7. If YOUTUBE_API_KEY is missing from env: graceful error message, not a crash

### Results Review
8. Default sort: highest relevance score first
9. Filter tabs (All / Pending / Approved / Rejected) toggle correctly
10. Thumbnail click opens YouTube embed inline

### Approve Flow
11. Approve button opens modal with pre-filled clip metadata form
12. Submit metadata â†’ success toast â†’ Clip record created in DB
13. Approved clip appears at /library (verify it shows in the grid)
14. Approved clip's detail page shows 'How It Works' tab (observation guide auto-generated)
15. Result shows 'Approved' status badge after approval

### Reject Flow
16. Reject button â†’ result immediately shows 'Rejected' status (optimistic UI)
17. Rejected results visible under Rejected filter

### Special Tactics
18. Create job with custom technique name (e.g. 'Triangle Gaze') â€” no errors, job executes
19. Communication tactics from taxonomy appear in the technique selector

### Edge Cases
20. Gibberish keywords â†’ 'No results found' shown gracefully (not crash)
21. Running a completed job again â†’ should not duplicate existing results
22. Non-admin user cannot access /admin/crawl-jobs (redirects to sign-in)

Status: PENDING â€” wait for Backend Engineer's review-request signal before starting.
